google_reviews.text:
I recently had a new cooker hood delivered and installed by Spartan Electrical, and the whole experience was excellent from start to finish.

Communication was outstanding throughout. After submitting my online enquiry, I quickly received a quote and was able to arrange an appointment without delay. A courtesy call before the visit added a thoughtful touch.

Carlos arrived right on time, looking professional and well-presented. His manner and workmanship were impressive—efficient, precise, and carried out with great attention to detail.

The installation was completed promptly, and my kitchen was left spotless afterwards. Carlos even cleaned my gas hob, which was an unexpected but much-appreciated extra step.

I would highly recommend Spartan Electrical and Carlos to anyone. I’ll definitely be a returning customer. Thank you again! Izabela

Fantastic experience with Spartan from initial contact to the communication throughout. Keith, Carlos and the team were friendly, professional and efficient. The guys arrived early (after to calling to confirm that this was fine with my schedule) and got the job done nice and quickly as well as cleaning up after themselves. Will not hesitate to contact the team at Spartan the next time we're needing electrical work done.

We recently had a full rewire completed by these guys and they were accommodating, friendly, efficient & tidy. The whole process from initial enquiry to receiving a quote and booking a date was seamless with great communication throughout and any questions answered promptly. I would have no hesitation in recommending them to others and will definitely be using them in the future.

I hired Spartan Electrical to do a complete rewire of our home (we were renovating). Initially, Carlos came out and walked the site followed by the most detailed estimate I received (had 3 other quotes). From the day Chris and Carlos stepped foot on site to the day they completed the job, they were professional, courteous, and reliable. They have a strong emphasis on safety which was paramount for my home. They even had an apprentice (Jake) that was similar to them possessing enthusiastic and a good work ethic. I have already asked them to quote me on another job for 2026. I can honestly say you’re in good hands with these guys! Highly recommended!!

The team came to perform a partial rewire for me recently and did a great job. Super clear communication of timescales and costs. High quality work and shared extensive documentation afterwards. Fully recommend
